questions.prompt: What happened first? Kim ran then rested.
What happened last? Dog barked and slept.
Retell: Cat climbed tree then jumped down.
questions.answer: Cat climbed tree and jumped down

feedback_rules.feedback: Assign mini-reteach and guided practice loop.

source_metadata.source_file: Grade 1 English Production Reading Comprehension Skill 6 Story Understanding + Retelling
